title: calappa datil
intro: Calappa datil, commonly known as the "Datil Pepper", is a type of hot pepper plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The Datil Pepper is valued for its numerous health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. Its therapeutic actions include providing antioxidant protection, antimicrobial effects, and potential cardiovascular benefits. The bioactive constituents of the Datil Pepper plant include capsaicin, which contributes to its heat, as well as other compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and carotenoids that provide its medicinal properties.
